\tzpentry{ID3371}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3371 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align*} T_{\text{kinetic}} &= \tfrac{1}{2} g^{ij}[\Psi]\,\pi_i\pi_j,\\ U_{\text{magnetic}} &= -\mu_{\mathrm{eff}}[\Psi]\cdot B_{\mathrm{ext}}(r_{\mathrm{cm}}(\Psi)) + \frac{\mu$_0}{8\pi}\int_V (|B_{\text{dipole}}|^2 + |B_{\text{gyro}}|^2)\,\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\ U_{\text{quantum}} &= \sum_n \hbar \omega_n\left(n_n + \tfrac{1}{2}\right)$ + U_{\text{tunnel}}[d(\Psi)],\\ H_{\text{coupling}} &= \frac{g_{\text{factor}}\,\mu_B}{\hbar}\,L_{\text{gyro}}[\Psi]\cdot\mu_{\mathrm{eff}}[\Psi] + $\lambda$_{\text{coupling}}\,A[r_{\text{obs}}]\cdot J_{\text{gyro}}[\Psi]. \end{align*}
